descripcion: Jettweb PHP Hazir Haber Sitesi Scripti V1 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the gallery_id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to gallery.php with malicious gallery_id values using UNION-based SQL injection to extract sensitive database information. 12/03/2026 12/03/2026 Vector CVSS:4.0 CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:X/CR:X/IR:X/AR:X/MAV:X/MAC:X/MAT:X/MPR:X/MUI:X/MVC:X/MVI:X/MVA:X/MSC:X/MSI:X/MSA:X/S:X/AU:X/R:X/V:X/RE:X/U:X Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N Gravedad 4.0 8.80 Gravedad 4.0 txt HIGH Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 8.20 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) HIGH

Jettweb PHP Hazir Haber Sitesi Scripti V3 contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the login.php administration panel that allows unauthenticated attackers to gain administrative access by submitting crafted SQL syntax.
